LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.0.description: They don't even have beds here.
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.0.label: no guest beds
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.1.description: There should be more beds for guests.
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.1.label: not enough guest beds
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.2.description: There are enough beds in our room for all of us.
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.2.label: enough beds
LanguageData.GuestBedCount.stages.3.label: lots of beds
LanguageData.GuestCantAffordBed.stages.0.description: I can't afford one of the beds.
LanguageData.GuestCantAffordBed.stages.0.label: can't afford a bed
LanguageData.GuestHasNoFood.stages.0.description: I don't have anything to eat.
LanguageData.GuestHasNoFood.stages.0.label: no food
